documentation.value:
```prisma
model User {
  id    Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  email String @unique
  name  String?
}
```
Define a data model that maps to a database table.

```prisma
enum Role {
  USER
  ADMIN
}
```
Define an enum type.

```prisma
datasource db {
  provider = "postgresql"
  url      = env("DATABASE_URL")
}
```
Configure the database connection.

```prisma
model Post {
  id       Int    @id @default(autoincrement())
  title    String
  author   User   @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id])
  authorId Int
}
```
Model with a relation to another model.

completions.label: many-to-many relation
one-to-one relation
middleware snippet

documentation.value:
```prisma
model ModelName { ... }
```
Declares a data model that maps to a database table or collection.

```prisma
enum EnumName { ... }
```
Declares an enum type with a fixed set of values.

```prisma
datasource db { ... }
```
Configures the database connection provider and URL.

```prisma
generator client { ... }
```
Configures code generators like Prisma Client.

```prisma
type Address {
  street String
  city   String
}
```
Declares a composite type (MongoDB only).

```prisma
view UserView {
  id    Int    @id
  email String
}
```
Declares a database view (preview feature).

```prisma
name String
```
Variable-length text. Maps to `TEXT`, `VARCHAR`, etc. depending on the database.

```prisma
age Int
```
32-bit integer. Maps to `INTEGER`, `INT`, etc.

```prisma
amount BigInt
```
64-bit integer for large numbers.

```prisma
price Float
```
Floating-point number. Maps to `DOUBLE PRECISION`, `FLOAT`, etc.

```prisma
price Decimal
```
Exact decimal number for financial calculations. Maps to `DECIMAL`, `NUMERIC`.

```prisma
isActive Boolean
```
True/false value. Maps to `BOOLEAN`, `BIT`, etc.

```prisma
createdAt DateTime @default(now())
```
Date and time value. Maps to `TIMESTAMP`, `DATETIME`, etc.

```prisma
metadata Json
```
JSON data. Maps to `JSON`, `JSONB`, etc.

```prisma
avatar Bytes
```
Binary data. Maps to `BYTEA`, `BLOB`, etc.

```prisma
geometry Unsupported("geometry")
```
Represents a database type not yet supported by Prisma.

```prisma
id Int @id
```
Marks a field as the primary key of the model.

```prisma
email String @unique
```
Adds a unique constraint to the field.

```prisma
isActive Boolean @default(true)
createdAt DateTime @default(now())
id String @default(uuid())
id String @default(cuid())
```
Sets a default value for the field.

```prisma
author User @relation(fields: [authorId], references: [id])
```
Defines the relation between two models.

```prisma
firstName String @map("first_name")
```
Maps a field name to a different database column name.

```prisma
updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
```
Automatically updates the field to the current timestamp on every update.

```prisma
legacyField String @ignore
```
Excludes a field from the Prisma Client API.

```prisma
title String @db.VarChar(255)
price Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)
```
Specifies the native database type for the field.

```prisma
model PostTag {
  postId Int
  tagId  Int
  @@id([postId, tagId])
}
```
Defines a composite primary key.

```prisma
@@unique([firstName, lastName])
```
Defines a composite unique constraint.

```prisma
@@index([email, name])
@@index([title], type: BTree)
```
Defines a database index on one or more fields.

```prisma
@@map("users")
```
Maps the model name to a different database table name.

```prisma
@@ignore
```
Excludes the entire model from the Prisma Client API.

```prisma
@@fulltext([title, content])
```
Defines a full-text search index (MySQL, PostgreSQL).

```prisma
@@schema("public")
```
Assigns the model to a specific database schema (multi-schema feature).

```prisma
id Int @id @default(autoincrement())
```
Generates an auto-incrementing integer value.

```prisma
id String @id @default(uuid())
```
Generates a UUID v4 value.

```prisma
id String @id @default(cuid())
```
Generates a CUID (collision-resistant unique identifier).

```prisma
createdAt DateTime @default(now())
```
Sets the default to the current date and time.

```prisma
id String @id @default(dbgenerated("gen_random_uuid()"))
```
Uses a database-level expression for the default value.

```prisma
url = env("DATABASE_URL")
```
References an environment variable.

```prisma
provider = "postgresql"
```
Specifies the datasource or generator provider.

```prisma
url = env("DATABASE_URL")
```
Database connection URL.

```prisma
directUrl = env("DIRECT_URL")
```
Direct database connection URL (bypasses connection pooler for migrations).

```prisma
shadowDatabaseUrl = env("SHADOW_DATABASE_URL")
```
URL for the shadow database used during migrations.

```prisma
relationMode = "prisma"
```
Sets the relation mode. Use `"prisma"` for databases without foreign key support (e.g., PlanetScale).

```prisma
output = "../generated/prisma"
```
Custom output directory for the generator.

```prisma
previewFeatures = ["fullTextSearch", "multiSchema"]
```
Enable Prisma preview features.

```prisma
binaryTargets = ["native", "linux-musl-openssl-3.0.x"]
```
Target platforms for the Prisma engine binaries.

```prisma
engineType = "library"
```
Specifies the Prisma engine type: `"library"` or `"binary"`.

```prisma
schemas = ["public", "auth"]
```
List of database schemas to use (multi-schema feature).

PostgreSQL database provider.

Connection URL format:
```
postgresql://USER:PASSWORD@HOST:PORT/DATABASE
```

MySQL database provider.

Connection URL format:
```
mysql://USER:PASSWORD@HOST:PORT/DATABASE
```

SQLite database provider.

Connection URL format:
```
file:./dev.db
```

Microsoft SQL Server provider.

Connection URL format:
```
sqlserver://HOST:PORT;database=DATABASE;user=USER;password=PASSWORD
```

MongoDB database provider.

Connection URL format:
```
mongodb+srv://USER:PASSWORD@HOST/DATABASE
```

CockroachDB database provider.

Connection URL format:
```
cockroachdb://USER:PASSWORD@HOST:PORT/DATABASE
```

```prisma
// This is a comment
```
Single-line comment.

```prisma
name String?
```
Makes a field optional (nullable).

```prisma
posts Post[]
tags  String[]
```
Makes a field a list/array.

```prisma
id Int @id @default(autoincrement())
```

```prisma
id String @id @default(uuid())
```

```prisma
id String @id @default(cuid())
```

```prisma
createdAt DateTime @default(now())
updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
```

```prisma
deletedAt DateTime?
isDeleted Boolean  @default(false)
```
Soft delete pattern with optional timestamp and boolean flag.

Enable full-text search capabilities.
```prisma
previewFeatures = ["fullTextSearch"]
```

Enable multi-schema support.
```prisma
previewFeatures = ["multiSchema"]
```

Enable database view support.
```prisma
previewFeatures = ["views"]
```

Enable PostgreSQL extension support.
```prisma
previewFeatures = ["postgresqlExtensions"]
```

Enable driver adapter support for serverless environments.
```prisma
previewFeatures = ["driverAdapters"]
```

```prisma
@relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
```
Specifies what happens when the referenced record is deleted.

```prisma
@relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onUpdate: Cascade)
```
Specifies what happens when the referenced record is updated.
Delete/update all related records when the referenced record is deleted/updated.
Prevent deletion/update of the referenced record if related records exist.
Similar to Restrict but checked at the end of the transaction.
Set the foreign key to NULL when the referenced record is deleted/updated.
Set the foreign key to its default value when the referenced record is deleted/updated.

```prisma
@@index([field], type: BTree)
```
Default index type. Good for equality and range queries.

```prisma
@@index([field], type: Hash)
```
Hash index. Good for equality queries only.

```prisma
@@index([field], type: Gin)
```
Generalized Inverted Index. Good for full-text search and JSON/array queries (PostgreSQL).

```prisma
@@index([field], type: Gist)
```
Generalized Search Tree. Good for geometric/spatial data (PostgreSQL).

```prisma
@@index([field], type: SpGist)
```
Space-partitioned GiST. Good for non-balanced data structures (PostgreSQL).

```prisma
@@index([field], type: Brin)
```
Block Range Index. Good for large tables with naturally ordered data (PostgreSQL).

```prisma
name String @db.VarChar(255)
```
Variable-length character string with max length.

```prisma
content String @db.Text
```
Unlimited-length text.

```prisma
id String @id @db.Uuid @default(dbgenerated("gen_random_uuid()"))
```
PostgreSQL native UUID type.

```prisma
createdAt DateTime @db.Timestamptz(6)
```
Timestamp with timezone (PostgreSQL).

```prisma
price Decimal @db.Decimal(10, 2)
```
Exact numeric type with precision and scale.

```prisma
metadata Json @db.JsonB
```
Binary JSON type with indexing support (PostgreSQL).
